title: Advanced Tool Stats
description: Real-time, high-precision durability tracking directly in your action bar—no F3+H required.
body:
# 🛠️ Advanced Tool Stats

Real-time durability tracking for the precision player.

Stop guessing how many blocks are left before your favorite pickaxe vanishes! Advanced Tool Stats is a lightweight, high-performance datapack for Minecraft 1.21.1 that brings technical durability data out of the F3 menu and directly onto your screen. This datapack tracks your item usage and displays the exact remaining uses in your action bar (right above your hotbar) the moment you hold a tool.

### ✨ Key Features

* Live HUD Display: Automatically shows "Remaining Uses" in the action bar when holding a tool.
    
* Precision Tracking: No more squinting at a tiny green/red bar or toggling F3 + H constantly.
    
* Multi-Material Support: Pre-configured logic for Iron, Diamond, and Netherite tiers.
    
* Vanilla Friendly: Works on any 1.21.1 server or single-player world. No mods or resource packs required!
    
* Optimized Performance: Designed with efficiency in mind; calculations only run when a player is actively holding a supported tool to ensure zero TPS lag.

#
    

### 🚀 Installation

1.  Download the .zip file.
    
2.  Navigate to your world folder.
    
3.  Drop the file into the datapacks folder.
    
4.  Type /reload in-game, and you're ready to mine!
